title: for loop consumes extreme amount of memory
body:
## Steps to reproduce the issue
[loop_issue.txt](https://github.com/YosysHQ/yosys/files/9359514/loop_issue.txt)

yosys> read_verilog -sv loop_issue.txt

Yosys version used:
Yosys 0.9+4081 (git sha1 862e84eb, clang 10.0.0-4ubuntu1 -fPIC -Os)

## Expected behavior
Yosys should be able to read the verilog file without consuming excessive amount of memory.

## Actual behavior
Yosys uses a huge amount of memory for this loop. It runs out of memory on a server with 32 Gbyte RAM.
If I change to loop to 20 iterations then it will suceed to read the file.
